other_observers: Joey Kellner, Norm Erthal; Larry Modesitt with Gregg Goodrich found this bird a day or 2 prior to the 12th.
description: A Robin-like bird with orange supercillium, gray breastband, unique orange markings on wings, whitish undertail coverts and flesh-tone legs. The bird was deemed a female by the gray color of the breastband and auriculars.Behaviors: skulking around on the ground in wooded area with small pond.Call: nonePlumage: adult female
